sample_resume.name: John Doe
sample_resume.text:
JOHN DOE
Email: john.doe@example.com | Phone: +1 (555) 123-4567 | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced Full Stack Developer with 5 years of professional software development experience. Proficient in JavaScript, Python, and React. Demonstrated ability to design, develop, and deploy scalable web applications. Strong problem-solving skills with experience working in Agile environments.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
- Languages: JavaScript (Intermediate), Python (Advanced), SQL (Intermediate), HTML (Intermediate), CSS (Intermediate)
- Frontend: React (Intermediate), Vue.js (Beginner), Bootstrap (Intermediate), Tailwind CSS (Beginner)
- Backend: Node.js (Intermediate), Express (Intermediate), Django (Beginner)
- Databases: MongoDB (Intermediate), PostgreSQL (Beginner), MySQL (Beginner)
- Tools: Git (Intermediate), Docker (Beginner), Linux (Beginner), VS Code, Postman
- Soft Skills: Communication, Problem Solving, Teamwork, Project Management

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Frontend Developer - TechCorp Inc (2021 - Present)
- Led development of React-based dashboard serving 100K+ users
- Implemented responsive UI components using Tailwind CSS
- Collaborated with 3 junior developers and provided code reviews
- Improved application performance by 40% through optimization
- Tech Stack: React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux

Full Stack Developer - Digital Solutions LLC (2019 - 2021)
- Built full-stack web applications using Node.js and React
- Designed and maintained PostgreSQL databases
- Implemented REST APIs with Express.js
- Managed Git repositories and CI/CD pipelines
- Tech Stack: Node.js, Express, React, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker

Junior Developer - StartUp XYZ (2018 - 2019)
- Developed features for Django-based web application
- Worked with Python and JavaScript
- Participated in Agile sprint planning and daily standups
- Tech Stack: Django, Python, JavaScript, MySQL

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science - Tech University (2018)
GPA: 3.7/4.0

CERTIFICATIONS
- React Developer Certification - Udemy (2021)
- Full Stack Web Developer Bootcamp - Coursera (2019)

PROJECTS
- E-commerce Platform: Built full-stack e-commerce platform using MERN stack
- Data Dashboard: Created interactive dashboard with React and D3.js
- Real-time Chat App: Developed chat application with Node.js and Socket.io

ADDITIONAL INFO
- Comfortable working in fast-paced startup environments
- Quick learner with self-drive and motivation
- Open to relocation and remote opportunities

sample_job_description.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
sample_job_description.text:
SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER

About Us
Tech Innovation Corp is a rapidly growing technology company specializing in enterprise solutions. We're looking for talented engineers to join our growing team.

Job Description
We are seeking an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for designing and implementing scalable web applications, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and mentoring junior developers.

Key Responsibilities
- Design and develop backend APIs using Python or Node.js
- Build responsive frontend applications using React
- Optimize database design and queries with PostgreSQL
- Implement CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
- Write clean, maintainable code with comprehensive documentation
- Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
- Mentor junior developers
- Collaborate with product and design teams

Required Skills
- 5+ years of professional software development experience
- Strong proficiency in JavaScript or TypeScript
- Expert-level React knowledge
- Solid understanding of backend development (Python/Node.js)
- Experience with SQL and relational databases (PostgreSQL)
- Git version control
- RESTful API design
- Problem-solving and analytical skills
- Strong communication and teamwork abilities

Nice to Have
- Docker and containerization
- Kubernetes orchestration
- AWS or cloud platform experience
- GraphQL implementation
- Machine Learning or AI knowledge
- Open source contributions
- Technical writing experience
- Leadership experience

Technical Stack
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Python (FastAPI/Django) or Node.js (Express)
- Database: PostgreSQL, Redis
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
- Cloud: AWS
- Tools: Git, Jira, Linux

Compensation & Benefits
- Salary: $150K - $200K per year (based on experience)
- Health insurance (medical, dental, vision)
- 401(k) with employer match
- Remote work flexibility
- Professional development budget
- 20 days PTO
- Stock options
- Gym membership

Location
Remote (US-based candidates preferred)

How to Apply
Please submit your resume, GitHub profile, and portfolio to careers@techcorp.example

Tech Innovation Corp is an Equal Opportunity Employer
